ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "model_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model year */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car type */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car's origin */,
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car's drive train */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) */,
  "invoice" REAL /* Invoice price */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "mpg_city" INTEGER /* Miles per gallon (MPG) in the city */,
  "mpg_highway" INTEGER /* Miles per gallon (MPG) on the highway */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the car in pounds */,
  "wheelbase" INTEGER /* Wheelbase in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length in inches */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the car uses */,
  "emissions" TEXT /* Emissions information */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the car model started production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the car model ended production */,
  "car_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the car */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_drive_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_train_id") REFERENCES drive_trains ("drive_train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origin ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES car_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_model_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_year_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the car type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car type */,
  "is_electric" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car type can be electric */,
  "is_sporty" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car type is considered sporty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origin" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_trains" (
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive train */,
  "drive_train_name" TEXT /* Name of the drive train */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive train */,
  "is_four_wheel_drive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the drive train is four-wheel drive */,
  "is_all_wheel_drive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the drive train is all-wheel drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the engine belongs to */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, I4) */,
  "engine_torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine */,
  "redline_rpm" INTEGER /* Redline RPM of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the transmission belongs to */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "num_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears */,
  "is_manual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transmission is manual */,
  "is_automatic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transmission is automatic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmissions_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiencies" (
  "fuel_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the fuel efficiency belongs to */,
  "mpg_city" INTEGER /* Miles per gallon (MPG) in the city */,
  "mpg_highway" INTEGER /* Miles per gallon (MPG) on the highway */,
  "combined_mpg" INTEGER /* Combined miles per gallon (MPG) rating */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiencies_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the car model */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the model */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model has been discontinued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
